docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-17-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT EBELING, INGRID
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,750.00 FILED BY KUIPER, GEORGE AS TO DEFENDANT EBELING, INGRID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-20-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KUIPER, GEORGE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EBELING, INGRID $1,750.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,800.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-19-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-19-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF GEORGE KUIPER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT INGRID EBELING IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-20-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-19-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF GEORTE KUPER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT INGRID EBELING IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-19-2017 - JUDGMENT.
